title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at JLL India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at JLL India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? JLL India in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JLL India:
JLL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JLL India!
